objective: Keep public promotion claims aligned with current direct benchmark and live LM Studio evidence before any broader MLX inference-stack promotion.

current_state_checks.git_status: clean before edit; branch ahead of origin by 17 commits

lmstudio_vlm_validation.current_gate: scripts/lmstudio_vlm_live_validation_preflight.py must report ready_for_live_validation=true before live VLM promotion
lmstudio_vlm_validation.reason: LM Studio still does not expose lmstudio-community/LFM2.5-VL-1.6B-MLX-8bit through lms ls --json, so live /v1/chat/completions validation has not run for the current retained VLM follow-up slice.

thread_unsafe_stream_runtime.reason: The current runtime still lacks mx.new_thread_unsafe_stream, so the opt-in shared-stream candidate remains a no-op and cannot produce a real A/B latency signal.

changed_files.change: Clarified that terminal-packed final KV is backed by direct retained-workload evidence and still requires the LM Studio VLM preflight/live-validation gate before any broader LM Studio packaging or promotion claim.

decision.next_action: Do not package or promote the current VLM follow-up through LM Studio until the retained model is visible to lms ls --json and the live validation path passes.
